Local · 15–20 min response

24/7 ambulance service, always minutes away.

Rapid-response ambulance and hearse van services around Kothanur, covering Hennur, Horamavu, Kammanahalli and Kalyan Nagar, with out-of-state transport across India.

Call now: 77609 11567
When every minute matters

Immediate response, day or night

Located centrally near SAIACS Bible College in Kothanur, St. Paul’s ambulance gets to you quickly within our core 7 km radius, and travels as far as your family needs.

  • Available 24 hours, 365 days
  • Local Bangalore transportation
  • Out-of-state & long-distance transport
  • Air-conditioned hearse vans
  • Compassionate, professional staff
Equipped & ready

Comfortable, clean, and properly fitted

Each vehicle carries a wheeled stretcher, oxygen support and room for family to travel alongside, so the journey stays safe and unhurried.

Our crews keep every ambulance sanitised and ready to roll the moment your call comes in.

Our ambulances

Maintained, sanitised, always ready

Tap any photograph to view it larger. These are the vehicles that answer your call.

Good to know

Ambulance service: common questions

How fast can your ambulance reach Kothanur and surrounding areas?

We are located near SAIACS Bible College in Kothanur. Our response time within a 7km radius (including Hennur, Horamavu, Kammanahalli, and Kalyan Nagar) is typically 15-20 minutes, 24/7.

Do you provide out-of-state ambulance services from Bangalore?

Yes. We cover local trips within Bangalore and safe, dignified out-of-state transport across India.

Are your ambulances equipped for dead body transportation?

Yes. Our hearse vans and ambulances are fitted for dignified dead body transport, with climate control and proper stretcher facilities.

Need an ambulance now? We answer immediately.

One call brings a fully equipped vehicle and a calm, professional crew to your door.

77609 11567 Get directions

Day or night, we answer

We are here when you need us.

St. Paul’s Funeral Undertakers

Dignified, budget-friendly funeral arrangements: ambulance, mortuary and repatriation services across Bangalore and beyond.

“Precious in the sight of the Lord
is the death of his faithful servants.”Psalm 116:15

24/7 emergency response

Need an ambulance right now?

Do not wait. Call and our crew is on the way. We answer day or night, and reach most of Kothanur, Hennur, Horamavu and Kalyan Nagar within about 20 minutes.

Call 77609 11567 now
